name: www.goethe-university-frankfurt.de
message: [AI generated] Goethe University Frankfurt, located in Frankfurt, Germany, is a renowned public research institution established in 1914. Named after the famous writer Johann Wolfgang von Goethe, it offers a wide range of programs across various disciplines, including humanities, social sciences, natural sciences, and economics. The university is known for its strong emphasis on research and its vibrant academic community.
